name: create_qor_ruledeck
full_help:
create_qor_ruledeck

Description: 
Create new QoR ruledecks

Syntax: 
create_qor_ruledeck  [-quiet] [-verbose] <ruledecks>...

Returns: 
Create new QoR ruledecks

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  <ruledecks>  Names of QoR rule decks to create

Categories: 
Netlist, Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
